_doc: Tracks the last point at which we audited the team-app repo for changes that could affect the customer-portal. Updated automatically by the sync workflow.
notes: Patched warehouse stock integrity end-to-end across portal + team app. New trigger: settle_stock_on_request_status (released stock on cancel, decremented on fulfilled). New trigger: outbound_cancelled_restores_stock (returns on_hand_qty when a team-app warehouse_order is cancelled — including re-instating any portal reservation if the order was linked to one). New column: warehouse_requests.fulfilled_by_order_id (FK → warehouse_orders, sets fulfilment linkage). create_outbound_shipment now has an OPTIONAL p_request_id param on both overloads — when passed, the function links the order + flips request status to fulfilled + the settle trigger sees the linkage and only releases reserved_qty (no double on_hand decrement). TEAM-APP CODE ACTION NEEDED: anywhere the team app calls create_outbound_shipment to fulfil a customer's warehouse request, pass the request_id as the new param so the system links them. Otherwise the team will need to manually flip warehouse_requests.status='fulfilled' AFTER create_outbound_shipment to clear the reservation — and on_hand_qty will NOT double-decrement thanks to the link-aware settle logic (but only if the link is set). Without either the param or a manual status flip, the reserved_qty stays hot indefinitely — which would gradually choke available_qty.
